name: qualimetry-ai
description: Qualimetry AI App: enforces coding standards, principles, policies, and surfaces AI review and rules-based analysis findings inside Claude Code.

plugins.name: qualimetry-ai-app
plugins.description: Bundles the four Qualimetry skills (coding-standards, review-check, analysis-issues, dependency-check), registers the Qualimetry MCP server, adds /compliance-* slash commands, a compliance-reviewer subagent, and a PostToolUse hook that surfaces review findings the moment a reviewed file is opened.
